properties.name: aquasecurity:trivy:Labels:description
properties.value: PostgreSQL is an advanced Object-Relational database management system (DBMS). The image contains the client and server programs that you'll need to create, run, maintain and access a PostgreSQL DBMS server.

properties.name: aquasecurity:trivy:Labels:io.k8s.description
properties.value: PostgreSQL is an advanced Object-Relational database management system (DBMS). The image contains the client and server programs that you'll need to create, run, maintain and access a PostgreSQL DBMS server.

properties.name: aquasecurity:trivy:Labels:org.opencontainers.image.description
properties.value: PostgreSQL 15 from Red Hat official image

properties.name: aquasecurity:trivy:Labels:summary
properties.value: PostgreSQL is an advanced Object-Relational database management system

properties.name: aquasecurity:trivy:Labels:usage
properties.value: podman run -d --name postgresql_database -e POSTGRESQL_USER=user -e POSTGRESQL_PASSWORD=pass -e POSTGRESQL_DATABASE=db -p 5432:5432 rhel9/postgresql-15
